NAME: DSCHRG_DSTNTN_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: This code set is an external code set maintained by the National Uniform Billing Committee 
(NUBC™) https://www.nubc.org/ 

COMMENT: This field comes from the claim status code that is present on the last claim record for the stay.
